calendar.matters:
Re-Notice Of Petition To Determine Identity Of Owner Of Real Property
Off Calendar Nov-09-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney Joseph C. Barton for the Petitioner Mary Gadles the moving party.
No opposing party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:
PETITIONER MARY GADLES Re-Notice Of Petition To Determine Identity Of Owner Of Real Property
is GRANTED. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Determine Identity Of Owner Of Real Property

PETITIONER MARY GADLES' Hearing On Petition To Determine Identity Of Owner Of Real Property is OFF CALENDAR, no proof of compliance with CCP 770.060(b) on file. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
